message:
feat(fcp-bootstrap): deterministic soft-token harness for hardware-token verification br-24llg.4.3.1

Add SoftTokenDriver implementing HardwareTokenSessionDriver with real
Ed25519 cryptographic operations derived from a fixed HKDF seed. The
harness exercises the full bootstrap pipeline (discovery, auth,
certificate selection, provisioning boundary) without needing SoftHSM
or any external PKCS#11 library.

24 tests covering: determinism across runs, PIN validation, certificate/key
enumeration, CKA_ID binding, close-action tracking, full pipeline happy
path, RSA-only/CA-only/empty-token refusals, workflow-level integration
with BootstrapWorkflow, mixed key type selection, and session timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
